acceptanceReviewed.criterion: Repo command validates completion and audit report parseability, required top-level keys, expected field types, nodeId directory matching, and valid real-world validation statuses.
Completion reports require present and empty unverifiedItems.
Plain repo-path entries in completion evidence arrays are checked for existence while URLs and prose are ignored.
The check is wired into just check and remains fast and stable.
Node evidence and qd reports were added under the required paths.
No product runtime, capture, encode, transport, decode, render, presentation, cross-device, or latency claim is made.

realWorldValidation.evidence: Repository report-shape validation only; `nix develop -c just qd-reports-check` and `nix develop -c just check` passed.
